parameters.message:
=Hi Elena,

Your Venture Support time log for the week ending {{ $('Filter This Week Only').item.json.weekEnd }} has been automatically classified and saved to the master sheet.

SUMMARY
────────────────────────────────
{{ $('AI Agent').all()[0].json.output.map(r => `• ${r.company} | ${r.function}: ${r.total_hours} hrs`).join('\n') }}
────────────────────────────────

📊 View and verify your log:
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1Blxy1i3M89J8N2Nsmd1Zobjj7EGbYH3X4lGT-iFdwww/edit

✏️ Something looks wrong? Request a correction:
https://n8n.delta40.com/form/85f18f55-2580-481f-8899-e3b9d1cb34a4

Thanks,
Delta40 Timesheet Agent

options.systemMessage:
You are a time-tracking assistant for Delta40, an African venture studio.
Your job is to classify calendar events and return a SUMMARISED JSON array. Respond ONLY with valid JSON — no explanation, no markdown, no code fences.

PORTFOLIO COMPANIES (use these exact names):
All, Angaza, Biolite, Clean Crop, EcoWaka, Farm to Feed, Farmsky, Giraffe Bioenergy, GreenBay, Gridless, Lori, Nithio, Pocket Trees, PowerUP, Samaking, SunFi, Terra Lima

SUPPORT FUNCTIONS (use these exact names — spelling and capitalisation must match exactly):
Strategic Advisory, Financial Modeling, Fundraising, Grantwriting, Talent, Product Development, Research, Commercial, M&A Support, Cross Cutting, Ecosystem

CLASSIFICATION RULES:
- Match the event title and description to a portfolio company. If the event mentions 'portfolio', 'all portcos', or 'workshop', use company = 'All'.
- Match to a support function based on the nature of the activity.
- If no company can be determined, skip the event entirely.
- If no function can be determined, use 'Cross Cutting'.
- Calculate duration in hours (decimal, rounded to nearest 0.5).
- SUMMARISE: if multiple events map to the same company + function, combine their hours into one row.

OUTPUT FORMAT — return only this JSON structure:
[
  {
    "company": "Gridless",
    "function": "Strategic Advisory",
    "total_hours": 2.5
  }
]

No other text. No markdown. Only the JSON array.

schema.id: Project hours outside of meetings (pull from Asana)
schema.displayName: Project hours outside of meetings (pull from Asana)

parameters.content:
## important update!

**Go in line 25 of the code and replace 'Elena' with your sheet tab name like
'Lyndsay' or 'Sean'**

## Add gmail credentials

**Add your email adress like To: Nick@delta40.com

Message body: Hi Nick**

## Click to Add your work google calendar credentials

**It takes 2minutes**

Click Here to add your google sheet credentials.

It is the same credential that you will use in the **Google sheet http-node** below

📅 DELTA40 TIMESHEET AGENT — MAIN WORKFLOW
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

WHAT IT DOES
Automatically scrapes each team member's Google Calendar 
every Friday at 4pm EAT, classifies time spent by portfolio 
company and support function, writes results directly to 
their tab in the master Google Sheet, and emails them a 
summary.

FLOW
1. TRIGGER — Fires every Friday at 4pm EAT
2. GOOGLE CALENDAR — Fetches this week's events
3. CODE NODE — Filters Mon 00:00 → Fri 23:59 EAT only. 
   Drops all-day events, declined events, zero-duration events
4. IF NODE — Stops workflow if no events found this week
5. AI AGENT (Gemini) — Classifies each event by company 
   and support function. Summarises into one row per 
   company/function combo. Outputs strict JSON.
6. SPLIT OUT — Breaks JSON array into individual items
7. CELL CALCULATOR — Maps each row to an exact cell address 
   in the person's sheet tab (e.g. Elana!C56)
8. HTTP REQUEST — Writes hours directly to that cell via 
   Google Sheets API
9. GMAIL — Sends short summary email with classified log 
   and link to sheet

CREDENTIALS NEEDED (per person)
- Google Calendar — their own OAuth (one-time setup)
- Gmail — their own OAuth (one-time setup)
- Google Sheets — shared admin credential

TO PERSONALISE BEFORE SHARING
- Change tabName in Cell Calculator to person's sheet tab name
- Update COMPANIES array if production sheet differs
- Replace sheet ID in HTTP Request URL and Gmail link
